creator: joji@eskimo.com
text:
(In reply to Henrik Rosenke from comment #4)

Yes, the installed version is the freebsd pkg repo.

And yes, I'll try compiling from source with Websockets enabled. Hopefully, I won't run into the same issue as OP. I was hoping to find out from the maintainer of the port if there was a specific upstream bug or some such that prevented default support for Websockets in the port in the pkg repo.
